claimText: Columbia University has a university-wide Generative AI Policy from the Office of the Provost governing use by staff, faculty, students, and researchers, covering information security, data privacy, copyright, academic integrity, and bias.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI Policy - Office of the Provost - Columbia University
